question: Tell me about yourself

What motivates you to work?
What are your greatest strengths?
What skills make you suitable for this role?
What achievement are you most proud of?
What is your biggest weakness?
How do you handle criticism?
Tell me about a challenge you faced.
Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
What are your career goals?
Why did you choose this career?
Describe a time you worked in a team.
How do you resolve conflicts in a team?
What role do you usually take in a team?
Tell me about a problem you solved.
How do you approach difficult tasks?
Describe a situation where you failed.
How do you learn new technologies?
What technology are you learning now?
How do you improve your skills?

What do you know about our company?
Why are you interested in this position?
Describe a stressful situation at work.
How do you manage your time?
Tell me about a leadership experience.
What are your long term goals?
How do you plan your career development?
What impact do you want to make in your field?
